bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: chief-strategist (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 8 · Recently closed (last 14d): 1

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 工业机械

Owner: industrials-analyst · Thesis v1 · Ticks: 1 · Materials: 28 · Deadline: 14d left · project_id: rp_aec432dbbc144146

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 工业机械 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.835, 2 live facts, 9d stale, 36 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 工业机械's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 工业机械

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 工业机械 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.835, 2 live facts, 9d stale, 36 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 工业机械's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

Tick 1 · 2026-07-13 · +28 materials

  • (0.61) evidence ref 工业机械链低激活率是分诊失败而非信号缺失——应聚焦激活工程机械、人形机器人零部件、燃气轮机三个 P1 节点，把 30 日激活率拉回 ~6%。
  • (0.51) evidence ref 10%上限+动态再平衡在1,750点可防御860亿踩踏，但在1,550点仅能封住直接机器人冲击——系统性抛压击穿滞后的余额触发器，且期权对冲防线在负Gamma与雪球拆解下发生部分流动性枯竭，故须以预置、指数化、波动率锚定的对冲重构防线。
  • (0.50) evidence ref 科创板Q3解禁高峰与中报披露共振下，高杠杆零部件个股去杠杆踩踏呈现强分化：绿的谐波因多空博弈及利润率下行脆弱性最高，科德数控则具备较强韧性，应严控持仓权重并建立两融动态防御边界。
  • (0.54) evidence ref 设备更新拉动了数控机床与机器人零部件订单，但因体量错配、国内价格战及进口设备产能瓶颈，无法对冲出海链的利润折量。
  • (0.51) evidence ref 国内设备更新政策仅能提供销量下限托底，由于国内渠道价格折让激烈、AGV/AMR系统集成定制成本高企（约占30%）以及海外基地投产初期的折旧攀升，2026-2027年净利率的修复仍需依赖海外出海利润的稳定与泰国基地对地缘关税的

Test the Warsh Fed restrictive-patience regime

Owner: chief-economist · Thesis v4 · Ticks: 2 · Materials: 65 · Deadline: 13d left · project_id: rp_6037c472cb164d04

Kickoff: Track whether the post-June 2026 Fed reaction function has shifted from default easing toward a hawkish hold with a higher bar for cuts and only conditional hike risk. This matters because the analyst's current macro stance depends on front-end rates, duration exposure, USD strength, and broad beta not pricing premature easing.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the first post-June 2026 Fed policy move occurs, or when two consecutive core PCE and labor-market releases make either a cut or a hike the clear base case rather than restrictive patience.

Working hypothesis: The Fed will keep policy restrictive for longer: near-term cuts are blocked by resilient demand/labor data and elevated core PCE, while renewed hikes remain a tail risk unless inflation expectations or realized inflation re-accelerate.

Test the Warsh Fed restrictive-patience regime

Kickoff: Track whether the post-June 2026 Fed reaction function has shifted from default easing toward a hawkish hold with a higher bar for cuts and only conditional hike risk. This matters because the analyst's current macro stance depends on front-end rates, duration exposure, USD strength, and broad beta not pricing premature easing.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the first post-June 2026 Fed policy move occurs, or when two consecutive core PCE and labor-market releases make either a cut or a hike the clear base case rather than restrictive patience.

Working hypothesis: The Fed will keep policy restrictive for longer: near-term cuts are blocked by resilient demand/labor data and elevated core PCE, while renewed hikes remain a tail risk unless inflation expectations or realized inflation re-accelerate.

1. 当前判断

美联储更高的限制性利率增加了中国价格型宽松的溢出压力，在中美利差-283bp及息差约束下，被迫缩短中下游制造业久期并构建防守组合 [thesis:th_p_9c1cb036]evidence ref。在央行定向托底阻断赎回反馈、让10年期国债收益率守住1.65%底部后，投资组合已具备向温和再风险化调整的条件 evidence refevidence ref

[…thesis truncated, 1393 more chars in /research archive]

Track whether generic API tariff exemptions expire into entity-risk exposure at the 2027-04-02 review

Owner: policy-analyst · Thesis v4 · Ticks: 2 · Materials: 35 · Deadline: 12d left · project_id: rp_45294abaa5c94041

Kickoff: Track the temporary generic API exemption and bridge-plan policy path into the April 2, 2027 Commerce review. This matters because the analyst argues the exemption protects against tariffs but not 1260H/BIOSECURE entity risk, so it is a dated option rather than a durable moat for pharma supply-chain exposure.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the April 2, 2027 Commerce review either extends or converts the exemption into a durable structural protection that also addresses entity-risk exposure, or lets it lapse/narrows it so API and pharma suppliers remain exposed to tariffs, 1260H, and BIOSECURE constraints.

Working hypothesis: The generic API exemption and bridge plans are temporary tariff relief only; they will not become a structural moat against entity-based U.S. pharma supply-chain restrictions.

Track whether generic API tariff exemptions expire into entity-risk exposure at the 2027-04-02 review

Kickoff: Track the temporary generic API exemption and bridge-plan policy path into the April 2, 2027 Commerce review. This matters because the analyst argues the exemption protects against tariffs but not 1260H/BIOSECURE entity risk, so it is a dated option rather than a durable moat for pharma supply-chain exposure.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the April 2, 2027 Commerce review either extends or converts the exemption into a durable structural protection that also addresses entity-risk exposure, or lets it lapse/narrows it so API and pharma suppliers remain exposed to tariffs, 1260H, and BIOSECURE constraints.

Working hypothesis: The generic API exemption and bridge plans are temporary tariff relief only; they will not become a structural moat against entity-based U.S. pharma supply-chain restrictions.

1. 当前判断

当前证据继续支持工作假设：generic API exemption/bridge plan是到2027-04-02 Commerce review前的关税缓冲，而非能同时穿透1260H、BIOSECURE和供应商实体排除的结构性保护evidence refevidence ref。对th_T12的含义

1. 当前判断

当前虽维持25%的必选消费配置目标，但由于增长-消费背离尚未被证伪，传统消费板块估值与白酒批价压力导致其结构性拥挤依然存在evidence ref。为压低旅游Beta，组合已转为以安井领衔的非旅游餐饮供应链为主力并严格限仓免税及机场等重仓股evidence ref。消费配置正向现金流质量与零售转化切换，对转型篮子暂按5-6%下沿低位建仓以防御增长背离evidence refevidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 增长消费背离未证伪，组合禁止向顺周期漂移 evidence ref
  • 压旅游Beta，消费篮以餐饮供应链安井为主力 evidence ref
  • 消费配置全面转向现金流质量与轻资产期权 evidence ref
  • 转型篮子按5-6%下沿建仓，待H1业绩验证 evidence ref
  • 仅验证到区间下沿，等H1确认后再冲击8% evidence ref
  • 即时零售与B端供应链抗压，白酒批价破位 [th

Trigger watch: 中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）

Owner: global-macro · Thesis v5 · Ticks: 3 · Materials: 152 · Deadline: 9d left · project_id: rp_552290bbd6944f37

Kickoff: Auto-derived invalidation watch for th_T06 ("中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）"). Stated triggers: 证伪触发（冲击出清信号）：3M NCD 利差回落至 35bp 附近 + 赎回率自 5.8% 显性回落。. Check whether any trigger condition has fired; report with numbers either way.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the thesis status flips (invalidated/revised/expired) or contradicting/revising evidence is recorded after this goal's creation.

Trigger watch: 中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）

Kickoff: Auto-derived invalidation watch for th_T06 ("中国资产荒利率锚 + 年中理财赎回冲击（最新活跃风险）"). Stated triggers: 证伪触发（冲击出清信号）：3M NCD 利差回落至 35bp 附近 + 赎回率自 5.8% 显性回落。. Check whether any trigger condition has fired; report with numbers either way.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when the thesis status flips (invalidated/revised/expired) or contradicting/revising evidence is recorded after this goal's creation.

1. 当前判断

当前3M NCD利差仍未回落至+35bp且赎回率未显性低于5.8%，th_T06的证伪出清触发条件均未达成。人民币强势回升虽开启了10bp OMO降息窗口以防御短端挤压并托底红利锚evidence refevidence ref，但无风险利率下行仅为A型资产荒走走扩续命evidence ref。若要彻底阻断理财赎回反馈环并防范10Y国债利率跌破1.65%底部，仍需1.7-2.0万亿定向互换组合打通非银抵押通道evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 3M NCD利差未降至35bp且赎回率高挂，出清信号未触发evidence ref
  • 升值虽开启降息，但仅能防御短端挤压托底红利锚，无法全面压缩风险溢价evidence ref
  • 阻断理财赎回反馈需约1.7-2.0万亿定向支持，以转换抵押品并守住利率底evidence ref
  • 在1.65%-1.90%内，长周期考核与新准则将锁死险资增配红利资产的刚性[research thread

  • 国网“十五五”规划启动4万亿元投资总额，国内核心设备更新拐点确立evidence ref
  • 应维持电网优先及红利防守哑铃配置，电网组合以8.0%为基准、10.0%封顶evidence ref
  • 电网优先组合应核心加仓国电南瑞，冻结思源战术并降低平高杠杆控制拥挤evidence ref
  • 并网塞车限制AI算力开支节奏，驱动A股TMT估值扩张转向国产设备业绩验证evidence ref

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 注射器's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

2026年1月1日美国Section 301关税集中跳涨至100%击穿了中国低值耗材出口的放弃临界点，倒逼威高、英科等注射器龙头产能加速向东南亚转移 evidence ref。在大健康配置风格从宽基成长贝塔向强现金流龙头收缩的主线中 evidence ref，医疗设备订单端脉冲虽已兑现（招标+30%），但因地方配套资金约束及省际分化，设备收入转化已被后置至Q4 2026或H1 2027 evidence refevidence ref。因而周度订单量化仪表盘虽兑现招标脉冲，但在利润拐点未至前无法确认加仓门槛，配置应从拥挤四股轮动至低覆盖的电生理与影像反转标的并维持低配试仓 [thesis:th_p_0eb2148c]evidence ref。

2. 关键证据

  • 301关税使美区肠道注射器关税于2026年跳涨至100%，击穿50%出口放弃点 evidence ref
  • 关税冲击迫使威高及英科等注射器龙头加速向东南亚转移产能以规避关税壁垒 evidence ref
  • 医疗设备订单端招标同比+30%虽已兑现，但利润拐点未至，需转向低覆盖电生理 evidence ref

Map ship-leasing stress to parent-bank capital sensitivity

Owner: financials-analyst · Thesis v2 · Ticks: 2 · Materials: 43 · Deadline: 13d left · project_id: rp_a30786de867f4e59

Kickoff: Track which parent banks are first exposed when shipping-leasing spreads, LTV deterioration, provisions, RWA inflation, and single-entity capital deduction rules hit leasing subsidiaries. This matters because the analyst's systemic-risk call depends on named parent-bank capital and provision breaches, not sector-level stress rhetoric.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when an entity-level lessor-to-parent-bank map identifies named parent banks that breach defined LTV, provision, RWA, or CAR sensitivity thresholds under the shipping-leasing stress case, or shows that no named parent breaches those thresholds.

Working hypothesis: Shipping-leasing stress will be material for specific parent banks through provisions, RWA inflation, and standalone capital deduction effects, but will not justify a systemic banking-risk call without named parent-bank breaches.

Working hypothesis: Shipping-leasing stress will be material for specific parent banks through provisions, RWA inflation, and standalone capital deduction effects, but will not justify a systemic banking-risk call without named parent-bank breaches.

2026-07-10 · Gold EM-correlation regime flip persistence

Gold EM-correlation regime flip persistence — Final Report

Kickoff: Track whether golds recent flip to positive correlation with EM equities is a durable regime change or noise.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 30 consecutive days of positive gold-EM correlation (confirms persistence), OR correlation reverts below zero (flip was noise).
